Georg Dües

IT Support | Linux | Training | Community | Swimming • Biking • Running

Hummus-addicted tech nerd. Into Arduino, programming, cooking, and exploring new things.

What I Do

  • I help teams solve tricky technical challenges in day-to-day support operations.
  • I share knowledge through training, documentation, and community exchange.
  • I build small tools and automations that make daily work easier.
